title: The Crew Shows New Power
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is the crew shows new power.
scene: The scene follows the crew shows new power, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What pathetic soldiers!! And they thought they could protect their country!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks like that soldier is about to try something...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's gonna blow himself up with dynamite and take someone else with him, bokan!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nuhhi!! If he does that, I will become dried squid-hhi!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If I can take out even one of these fiends ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...before the princes arrive, I will be sati- sified....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is that thing......?!! Just how far is it gonna keep on going....?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...was just an ordinary brute force attack...!

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: Only minutes ago he was half-dying from the effects of overdosing on energy steroids... and now this-hhi?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your hair's gone white, and even your body has changed, but.... how do you feel right now, captain...?

summary: The Crew Shows New Power. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
